name: Multi-Agent Swarm Coordination
description: Hierarchical agent swarm pattern with a coordinator dispatching subtasks to specialist agents, synthesizing results, and publishing a unified response.
author: Murphy System

nodes.label: Task Intake
nodes.description: Receives high-level goal or task from user, API, or upstream workflow.

nodes.label: Swarm Coordinator
nodes.description: Decomposes the goal into subtasks and dispatches them to specialist agents in parallel.

nodes.label: Specialist Agent Pool
nodes.description: Pool of domain-specific agents (research, code, analysis, writing) that execute assigned subtasks.

nodes.label: Result Synthesizer
nodes.description: Merges outputs from all specialist agents into a coherent, unified response.

nodes.label: Response Output
nodes.description: Delivers synthesized result to the requesting system or user channel.
